checkpoints.name: identify_repos
checkpoints.detail: Found 2/3 repos in plan (missed etcd as intermediary)

checkpoints.name: topological_order
checkpoints.detail: Partially valid ordering; 1/3 dependency constraints satisfied; 2/3 repos covered; missing: etcd-io/etcd

notes: Baseline agent found grpc-go and k8s but failed to identify etcd as intermediary. Without cross-repo dependency graph, agent proposed updating k8s directly after grpc-go, skipping etcd client library update.
